title: BS eva theorys
wikitext:
[]: BS eva theorys             Quote Post by DatDude » Mon Sep 26, 2005 5:36 pm What is your favorite bs eva theory? Their are dozens out their, and we all heard most of them so post away. Mine is the one that sent me into the internet, and lead me to you my friends (im sure you would kill the people responcable if you could :)) Kaji survived the series and was the person leading the attack on the geofront.

[]:             Quote Post by sachiel » Mon Sep 26, 2005 5:40 pm OHYES, because Kaji dodges bullets Matrix-style. (edited stealthy-like) That theory makes me wanna cry. Ah, lessee, BS Eva theories. The one where someone said they knew what Gendo was saying to Ritsuko before shooting her in EoE. They said they could 'read his lips'.

[]:             Quote Post by Hexon.Arq » Mon Sep 26, 2005 6:39 pm I like the one about Shinji removing his ribs so he could suck his own dick. Oh wait.

[]:             Quote Post by thewayneiac » Mon Sep 26, 2005 7:15 pm Oh, lets see; there are so many: Shinji and Asuka are Adam and Eve. Keel is the Wandering Jew. It's not really Asuka at the end of the movie; it's Shinji's fantasy amalgam of Asuka, Rei and Misato. Naoko is in Unit-00. The list goes on and on. Not to mention our own Mr. Tines' infamous theory that Asuka caresses Shinji's face at the end of the movie to thank him for killing her, and then expresses disgust because he doesn't do it.

[]:             Quote Post by TsubasaNoKoikokoro » Mon Sep 26, 2005 8:14 pm thewayneiac wrote: Oh, lets see; there are so many: Shinji and Asuka are Adam and Eve. Keel is the Wandering Jew. It's not really Asuka at the end of the movie; it's Shinji's fantasy amalgam of Asuka, Rei and Misato. Naoko is in Unit-00. The list goes on and on. Not to mention our own Mr. Tines' infamous theory that Asuka caresses Shinji's face at the end of the movie to thank him for killing her, and then expresses disgust because he doesn't do it.

[]:             Quote Post by sachiel » Mon Sep 26, 2005 8:17 pm Tsu-chan wrote: thewayneiac wrote: Oh, lets see; there are so many: Shinji and Asuka are Adam and Eve. Keel is the Wandering Jew. It's not really Asuka at the end of the movie; it's Shinji's fantasy amalgam of Asuka, Rei and Misato. Naoko is in Unit-00. The list goes on and on. Not to mention our own Mr. Tines' infamous theory that Asuka caresses Shinji's face at the end of the movie to thank him for killing her, and then expresses disgust because he doesn't do it.

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Mon Sep 26, 2005 8:50 pm Ok ok as maker of this thread please remember this is for stuff so increadaly dumb it could never ber true no grey in it all.

[]:             Quote Post by TsubasaNoKoikokoro » Mon Sep 26, 2005 8:55 pm Er... Shinji has a brother named Goku who fell into a parrarel dimention and in the process gew a tail...? I mean really, look at their hair! =p

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Tue Sep 27, 2005 12:56 am thewayneiac wrote: Oh, lets see; there are so many: Shinji and Asuka are Adam and Eve. Keel is the Wandering Jew. It's not really Asuka at the end of the movie; it's Shinji's fantasy amalgam of Asuka, Rei and Misato. Naoko is in Unit-00. The list goes on and on. Not to mention our own Mr. Tines' infamous theory that Asuka caresses Shinji's face at the end of the movie to thank him for killing her, and then expresses disgust because he doesn't do it. All the mentioned are common views of Eva which are impossible to disprove. They aren't bs, they just aren't what we all think...

[]:             Quote Post by aranami » Tue Sep 27, 2005 8:09 am that Asuka is pregnent in the end

[]:             Quote Post by Zuggy » Tue Sep 27, 2005 8:21 am Deleted.

[]:             Quote Post by thewayneiac » Tue Sep 27, 2005 1:09 pm aranami wrote: that Asuka is pregnent in the end

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Sep 27, 2005 2:09 pm First accusations of over-analysis, and now thewayneiac wrote: The list goes on and on. Not to mention our own Mr. Tines' infamous theory...

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Tue Sep 27, 2005 3:50 pm @thewayneiac Hooo yea This is the all time BS eva theory Gendo was acting acrding to kind gental YUI'S plan when he treated Shinji like crap for ten years, because it was the only way to protect him from Seele.

[]:             Quote Post by thewayneiac » Tue Sep 27, 2005 7:12 pm Mr. Tines wrote: First accusations of over-analysis, and now thewayneiac wrote: The list goes on and on. Not to mention our own Mr. Tines' infamous theory...

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Tue Sep 27, 2005 8:00 pm thewayneiac wrote: Since you need to have the will to live in order to return, it makes no sense to say she came back because she wanted to be killed.

[]:             Quote Post by K2Grey » Tue Sep 27, 2005 9:32 pm Baron of Hell = Eva theory. Not only are the Evas not supposed to be barons of Hell, the barons of Hell do not even exist in the first place.

[]:             Quote Post by Hiromakuta » Wed Sep 28, 2005 5:01 am BS Eva Theories? Everything itÂ´s just an illusion for Shinji.

[]:             Quote Post by Shin-seiki » Wed Sep 28, 2005 11:26 am thewayneiac wrote: Since you need to have the will to live in order to return, it makes no sense to say she came back because she wanted to be killed.

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Wed Sep 28, 2005 12:04 pm How about the one were Misatos only reason for taking Shinji in was because shes a pedo?
